name: Kanna
summary: Internal cross-linking supports Kanna through compounds such as mesembrenone, mesembranol, mesembrine.
description: Internal cross-linking supports Kanna through compounds such as mesembrenone, mesembranol, mesembrine.
safetyNotes: CNS-active and potentially serotonergic. Avoid casual stacking with antidepressants or empathogenic/stimulant products.
contraindications: active psychiatric medication use without clinician oversight.

sources.title: A Chewable Cure "Kanna": Biological and Pharmaceutical Properties of Sceletium tortuosum
Mesembrine alkaloids: Review of their occurrence, chemistry, and pharmacology

GC-MS, LC-MS(n), LC-high resolution-MS(n), and NMR studies on the metabolism and toxicological detection of mesembrine and mesembrenone, the main alkaloids of the legal high "Kanna" isolated from Sceletium tortuosum

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fermented aerial material and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fermented aerial material and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
